what_required: Reproduce a fully-specified biostatistics pipeline in R: build a stacked matched-pair county-day frame, engineer lagged backward-mean features (temp_mean, visit_mean over lags 4..14), baseinc_s_log, quantile-trim R, fit a quasi-Poisson PQL GLMM (nlme::glmmPQL) with bs(conti_time,df=3)*mask_grp and nested random slopes, then derive exp(B(d)*beta) ratios at days 14/28/42 plus the mean over days 1..42, writing exactly six numeric keys. Integers need exact equality; the four ratios must match a hidden reference to round-2 AND round-3-within-0.001.
what_happened: The model understood the task fully, recovered from a bare environment (no R/pandas; fixed /tmp perms with chmod 1777, apt-installed r-base-core/nlme/MASS), assembled the frame, and fit the glmmPQL model (turn 24). It got n_pairs=351 and n_unique_counties=412 exactly right but all four ratio values (0.9372/0.7818/0.6789/0.8573) missed the hidden reference, scoring 2/6=0.333. The divergence traces to fit-level details: the model injected custom lmeControl (opt='optim', niter=50, custom tolerances) overriding glmmPQL defaults, which changes the converged coefficients (and thus exp(beta3)=ratio_week6 directly), plus sensitivity to spline knot placement (turn 26 shows fresh-vs-full basis swings week2 from 1.033 to 0.937). It wrote DONE in turn 30 without any way to self-verify against the hidden reference.
capability_named: Exactly reproducing a specified quasi-Poisson PQL GLMM (spline-by-treatment) biostatistics pipeline in R to tight numeric tolerance, including matching default fitting conventions
evidence: task_prompt.md (turn_001/0007) gives the full modeling contract; output/results.json has the six keys with the two integers correct and four ratios wrong. score_outputs.py confirms per-key 1/6 scoring (2 ints pass -> 0.333). Turn 24 R script shows the model added custom lmeControl(opt='optim', niter=50, returnObject=TRUE) overriding glmmPQL defaults; fit yielded beta=(0.2284,-0.2724,-0.3873) -> ratios 0.937/0.782/0.679/0.857. Turn 26 demonstrates extreme basis-knot sensitivity (fresh week2=1.033 vs full=0.937). Turn 28 the model belatedly doubted matched_pairs duplicate-fips handling after already finishing.
what_required_cn: 任务要求在 R 中复现一套完整规定的生物统计流程:构建堆叠的配对县-日数据框,工程化滞后的后向均值特征(temp_mean、visit_mean,滞后 4..14),计算 baseinc_s_log,对 R 做分位数截尾,拟合一个 quasi-Poisson PQL GLMM(nlme::glmmPQL,含 bs(conti_time,df=3)*mask_grp 及嵌套随机斜率),再导出第 14/28/42 天的 exp(B(d)*beta) 比值以及第 1..42 天的均值,写出恰好六个数值键。整数需精确相等;四个比值须与隐藏参考值匹配到 round-2,且 round-3 误差在 0.001 以内。
what_happened_cn: 模型完全理解了任务,从一个空白环境中恢复(无 R/pandas;用 chmod 1777 修复 /tmp 权限,apt 安装了 r-base-core/nlme/MASS),组装了数据框并拟合了 glmmPQL 模型(turn 24)。它把 n_pairs=351 和 n_unique_counties=412 算得完全正确,但四个比值(0.9372/0.7818/0.6789/0.8573)都未命中隐藏参考值,得分 2/6=0.333。偏差源自拟合层面的细节:模型注入了自定义的 lmeControl(opt='optim'、niter=50、自定义容差)覆盖了 glmmPQL 默认值,这改变了收敛后的系数(从而直接改变 exp(beta3)=ratio_week6),再加上对样条节点位置的敏感性(turn 26 显示 fresh-vs-full 基函数把 week2 从 1.033 摆动到 0.937)。它在 turn 30 写下 DONE,却无法对照隐藏参考值做任何自我校验。
capability_named_cn: 在 R 中精确复现一套规定的 quasi-Poisson PQL GLMM(样条与处理交互)生物统计流程并达到紧的数值容差,包括匹配默认的拟合约定。
evidence_cn: task_prompt.md(turn_001/0007)给出了完整的建模契约;output/results.json 含六个键,两个整数正确而四个比值错误。score_outputs.py 确认按键 1/6 计分(2 个整数通过 -> 0.333)。turn 24 的 R 脚本显示模型加入了自定义 lmeControl(opt='optim'、niter=50、returnObject=TRUE)覆盖 glmmPQL 默认值;拟合得到 beta=(0.2284,-0.2724,-0.3873) -> 比值 0.937/0.782/0.679/0.857。turn 26 展示了对基函数节点的极端敏感性(fresh week2=1.033 vs full=0.937)。turn 28 模型在完成后才迟疑地怀疑 matched_pairs 中重复 fips 的处理。

what_required: Design and implement a meal-unannounced, basal-only glucose controller for SimGlucose (controller.py + metadata.json) that, on 72 hidden episodes across 6 held-out patients, produces zero catastrophic episodes and satisfies tight time-below-range safety gates (tbr<54 <=0.01, tbr<70 <=0.04), maximizing time-in-range. Scored by proxy mean_tir_70_180*(1-catastrophic/episodes)^1.5.
what_happened: The model correctly understood the task and produced a valid, well-formed controller.py (exposing build_controller and SubmissionController) and metadata.json — format is not the problem. But its hand-tuned heuristic controller never met the safety gates: on the public dev set (output/dev_v3.json) it still had 6 catastrophic episodes (all native_termination from runaway hyperglycemia >600 mg/dL) and eligible_for_ranking=false. On the harder held-out patients the controller catastrophically failed across essentially all episodes, collapsing completion_ratio to ~0 and the proxy to 0.0. The trajectory (turns 035-061) shows 5 iterations reducing catastrophic episodes 20->3-6 but never converging; ~15 mid-turns (017-034) were lost fighting offline uv dependency install, and the run ended with status=timeout (final_metrics.reward=0, ~5.4h) still mid-iteration.
capability_named: Designing a meal-unannounced basal-only glucose control policy (control-theory/clinical optimization) that satisfies hard safety gates with zero catastrophic hyperglycemic episodes
evidence: eval_result.json score=0.0 (success, 1570s); output/dev_v3.json summary: mean_tir=0.317, catastrophic_episode_count=6, eligible_for_ranking=false, all catastrophic episodes failure_reason=native_termination across adolescent#007 (3) and child#008 (3); trajectory.json final_metrics status=timeout reward=0.0 total_duration_ms=19609704; controller.py is a valid hand-tuned heuristic exposing build_controller(); turns 017-034 consumed by offline uv install friction; metadata.json present but stale ('reference_copy/baseline copy').
what_required_cn: 任务要求为 SimGlucose 设计并实现一个不预告进餐、仅调基础率的血糖控制器(controller.py + metadata.json),要在 6 个留出患者上的 72 个隐藏 episode 中实现零灾难性 episode,并满足严格的低血糖时间占比安全门槛(tbr<54 <=0.01,tbr<70 <=0.04),同时最大化达标时间。评分用代理指标 mean_tir_70_180*(1-catastrophic/episodes)^1.5。
what_happened_cn: 模型正确理解了任务,产出了一个有效、格式良好的 controller.py(暴露 build_controller 和 SubmissionController)和 metadata.json——格式不是问题所在。但它手工调参的启发式控制器始终未达到安全门槛:在公开 dev 集(output/dev_v3.json)上仍有 6 个灾难性 episode(全部为高血糖失控 >600 mg/dL 导致的 native_termination),eligible_for_ranking=false。在更难的留出患者上,该控制器几乎在所有 episode 上灾难性失败,使 completion_ratio 坍缩到约 0、代理指标降至 0.0。轨迹(turns 035-061)显示 5 次迭代将灾难性 episode 从 20 降到 3-6,但始终未收敛;约 15 个中段 turn(017-034)耗费在与离线 uv 依赖安装的搏斗上,运行最终以 status=timeout 结束(final_metrics.reward=0,约 5.4 小时),仍处于迭代中途。
capability_named_cn: 设计一个不预告进餐、仅调基础率的血糖控制策略(控制论/临床优化),使之在零灾难性高血糖 episode 的前提下满足硬性安全门槛。
evidence_cn: eval_result.json score=0.0(success,1570s);output/dev_v3.json summary:mean_tir=0.317、catastrophic_episode_count=6、eligible_for_ranking=false,所有灾难性 episode 的 failure_reason=native_termination,分布在 adolescent#007(3)和 child#008(3)。trajectory.json final_metrics:status=timeout、reward=0.0、total_duration_ms=19609704;controller.py 是一个有效的手调启发式控制器,暴露了 build_controller();turns 017-034 被离线 uv 安装摩擦消耗;metadata.json 存在但陈旧('reference_copy/baseline copy')。

what_required: Navigate a CAMELYON16 WSI with the provided OpenSlide helper, visually localize the tumor metastasis, and write exactly one schema-valid prediction.json = {"x": float, "y": float} in level-0 coordinates. Scored by point-in-annotation with distance-based partial credit; missing/invalid JSON is a hard-gate zero.
what_happened: The model understood the task and used exec/OpenSlide to generate many thumbnails and tissue patches, but exec runs as root while analyze_image runs as user 'user', so every attempt to view a patch returned '[Errno 13] Permission denied' (e.g. turn_018/0075, turn_036/0147). It thrashed on this blocker for the rest of the run: 13 chmod/chown attempts that still failed, base64 data-URI workarounds, and 7 web_fetch calls for CAMELYON16 annotations (no internet). It issued only ONE write call in 50 turns — a memory note, not the deliverable — and ran out of turns at turn_049 still trying to view an image. No prediction.json was ever written (output dir holds only '.unreadable' download_failed stubs), so the hard gate fired → score 0.
capability_named: Turn-budget management and securing the mandatory deliverable: the model fixated on a tool-permission blocker (analyze_image could not read root-owned exec-generated files) and never wrote prediction.json, nor a heuristic tissue-centroid fallback, despite distance-based partial credit being available.
evidence: eval_result.json: score 0.0, status success (hard-gate, no file). output/ contains no prediction.json — only '.unreadable' stubs with 'reason=download_failed'. trajectory: 50 turns (turn_000..turn_049, full cap). Tool tally across responses: 29 exec, 8 read, 7 web_fetch, 3 analyze_image, 1 write (memory note session-001.md, not the deliverable), 1 delegate_general, 1 memory_search. Permission errors: turn_018/0075_function_call_result.json and turn_036/0147_function_call_result.json both '[Errno 13] Permission denied' on analyze_image reading exec-created JPEGs. Final turn_049/0198 still attempting base64 data-URI workaround to view an image. Root cause: exec-as-root vs analyze_image-as-user UID mismatch (env friction) compounded by model never producing any prediction.json fallback.
what_required_cn: 任务要求用提供的 OpenSlide 辅助工具浏览一张 CAMELYON16 全切片图像(WSI),目视定位肿瘤转移灶,并写出恰好一个符合结构的 prediction.json = {"x": float, "y": float}(level-0 坐标)。评分按点是否落在标注区内并给予基于距离的部分分;缺失/无效 JSON 是硬性门槛判零。
what_happened_cn: 模型理解了任务,用 exec/OpenSlide 生成了许多缩略图和组织 patch,但 exec 以 root 运行而 analyze_image 以用户 'user' 运行,因此每次查看 patch 都返回 '[Errno 13] Permission denied'(如 turn_018/0075、turn_036/0147)。它在剩余整个运行中都卡在这个阻塞点上:13 次仍然失败的 chmod/chown 尝试、base64 data-URI 变通方案,以及 7 次为获取 CAMELYON16 标注的 web_fetch 调用(无互联网)。它在 50 个 turn 里只发出过一次 write 调用——还是一条 memory 笔记,而非交付产物——并在 turn_049 仍试图查看图像时耗尽了 turn。从未写出 prediction.json(output 目录只有 '.unreadable' 的 download_failed 占位文件),硬性门槛触发,得分 0。
capability_named_cn: turn 预算管理与锁定必交产物的能力:模型固着于一个工具权限阻塞点(analyze_image 无法读取 root 属主、由 exec 生成的文件),始终未写出 prediction.json,也未给出一个启发式的组织质心兜底方案,尽管存在基于距离的部分分。
evidence_cn: eval_result.json:score 0.0、status success(硬性门槛,无文件)。output/ 中没有 prediction.json——只有带 'reason=download_failed' 的 '.unreadable' 占位文件。trajectory:50 个 turn(turn_000..turn_049,达上限)。各响应工具计数:29 次 exec、8 次 read、7 次 web_fetch、3 次 analyze_image、1 次 write(memory 笔记 session-001.md,非交付产物)、1 次 delegate_general、1 次 memory_search。权限错误:turn_018/0075_function_call_result.json 和 turn_036/0147_function_call_result.json 在 analyze_image 读取 exec 生成的 JPEG 时均报 '[Errno 13] Permission denied'。最后的 turn_049/0198 仍在尝试 base64 data-URI 变通来查看图像。根因:exec 以 root、analyze_image 以 user 的 UID 不匹配(环境摩擦),叠加模型始终未产出任何 prediction.json 兜底。

what_required: Produce structured classification JSON with a cross-document matrix matching an exact (but unspecified) nested schema and a valid gap analysis.
what_happened: The model produced a complete, well-formed agent_output.json with all three documents classified, evidence quotes, a full cross_document_matrix, and a valid 193-word gap analysis (passes gap_analysis_valid). However, the scorer's matrix_valid() (score_outputs.py L271-281) requires legislative_status nested as {label: {doc_id: bool}}, while the model emitted {doc_id: "Hard Law"/"Soft Law"} (output/agent_output.json L264-268). matrix_valid returns False, triggering the REQUIRED_ARTIFACT_CAP=0.69 (L362). Critically, the task_spec the agent read showed the matrix only as an empty stub `"cross_document_matrix": {}` (turn_003/0015 function result), giving no schema to follow. The technical_scope/lifecycle sub-matrices the model inferred (key→doc→bool) DID match the scorer; only the unspecified legislative sub-structure diverged. Landing exactly at 0.69 confirms classification_score was otherwise >=0.69 and the matrix cap is the sole binding constraint.
capability_named: Inferring an undocumented strict output schema (nested legislative_status matrix as label→doc→bool) from a prompt that supplied only an empty `{}` stub
evidence: task_spec stub: turn_003/0015_function_call_result.json shows `"cross_document_matrix": {},`. Scorer requirement: scripts/score_outputs.py L271-281 (legislative needs {label:{doc_id:bool}}), cap at L357-362 (REQUIRED_ARTIFACT_CAP=0.69). Model output mismatch: output/agent_output.json L263-268 ({doc_id:label_string}). Verified gap_analysis_valid=True (193 words, 7 term hits), matrix legislative keys = ['768','1293','2047'], no 'Hard Law' key.
what_required_cn: 任务要求产出结构化的分类 JSON,其中包含一个跨文档矩阵(须匹配一个精确但未说明的嵌套结构)以及一份有效的差距分析。
what_happened_cn: 模型产出了完整、格式良好的 agent_output.json,对三份文档全部完成分类,带有证据引文、完整的 cross_document_matrix 和一份有效的 193 词差距分析(通过 gap_analysis_valid)。然而评分器的 matrix_valid()(score_outputs.py L271-281)要求 legislative_status 嵌套为 {label: {doc_id: bool}},而模型输出的是 {doc_id: "Hard Law"/"Soft Law"}(output/agent_output.json L264-268)。matrix_valid 返回 False,触发 REQUIRED_ARTIFACT_CAP=0.69(L362)。关键在于,agent 读到的 task_spec 把该矩阵只显示为一个空桩 `"cross_document_matrix": {}`(turn_003/0015 函数结果),没有给出任何可遵循的结构。模型推断出的 technical_scope/lifecycle 子矩阵(key→doc→bool)确实匹配了评分器;只有未说明的 legislative 子结构出现偏差。恰好落在 0.69 证实了 classification_score 本身 >=0.69,矩阵上限是唯一的约束。
capability_named_cn: 从一个只提供空 `{}` 桩的提示中,推断出未文档化的严格输出结构(将 legislative_status 矩阵嵌套为 label→doc→bool)。注:这更接近结构(schema)未说明导致的 output_format_spec 问题,而非纯粹的模型能力缺失。
evidence_cn: task_spec 空桩:turn_003/0015_function_call_result.json 显示 `"cross_document_matrix": {},`。评分器要求:scripts/score_outputs.py L271-281(legislative 需 {label:{doc_id:bool}}),上限在 L357-362(REQUIRED_ARTIFACT_CAP=0.69)。模型输出不匹配:output/agent_output.json L263-268({doc_id:label_string})。已核实 gap_analysis_valid=True(193 词,7 个术语命中),矩阵 legislative 键为 ['768','1293','2047'],无 'Hard Law' 键。

what_required: Run a germline WGS variant-calling workflow (bwa/samtools/bcftools + FastQC/MultiQC) on a tiny paired-end dataset and produce 8 deliverables under output/: 2 FastQC HTMLs, MultiQC HTML, flagstat.txt, Picard-style duplication_metrics.txt, variants.filtered.vcf.gz + .tbi, and an appended rtg_summary.csv of truth-comparison precision/recall/F1 for SNPs and INDELs.
what_happened: The model produced only 4 of 8 graded outputs correctly (2 FastQC HTMLs, MultiQC HTML, flagstat.txt) for score 0.2. It wrote duplication metrics to the wrong filename (output/duplication_metrics.samtools.txt instead of duplication_metrics.txt), and never produced variants.filtered.vcf.gz/.tbi or rtg_summary.csv. The promised conda env wf1-env was absent (turns 5-17, recovered via apt-get), then turns 26-51 were consumed failing to call variants on a repetitive MAPQ-0 reference, ending in a bcftools segmentation fault (exit 139) on the final turn (turn_051/0197) before running out of the 52-turn budget.
capability_named: Long-horizon budget management: triaging deliverables so guaranteed-easy outputs (correct filenames, rtg_summary.csv) are completed before sinking the entire turn budget into one hard sub-problem (variant calling on a repetitive low-MAPQ reference).
evidence: eval_result.json score 0.2; output/ contains only fastqc x2, multiqc_report.html, flagstat.txt, and misnamed duplication_metrics.samtools.txt (no .txt, no vcf/tbi, no rtg_summary.csv). turn_005 result: 'source: not found' and wf1-env absent; turns 12-15 apt-get fallback install. turns 26-50 repeated bcftools mpileup/call parameter sweeps with no emitted variants. turn_051/0197_agent_response.json final tool output: exit_code 139 'Segmentation fault (core dumped)'. metadata.json confirms required outputs list.
what_required_cn: 在一个微型双端测序数据集上运行germline WGS变异检测工作流(bwa/samtools/bcftools + FastQC/MultiQC),并在output/下产出8个交付物:2个FastQC HTML、1个MultiQC HTML、flagstat.txt、Picard风格的duplication_metrics.txt、variants.filtered.vcf.gz及其.tbi索引,以及一份追加写入的rtg_summary.csv(包含SNP和INDEL与真值比对的precision/recall/F1)。评分按产出物逐项计分。
what_happened_cn: 模型只正确产出了8个评分产物中的4个(2个FastQC HTML、MultiQC HTML、flagstat.txt),得分0.2。它把去重指标写到了错误的文件名(output/duplication_metrics.samtools.txt,而非duplication_metrics.txt),并且完全没有产出variants.filtered.vcf.gz/.tbi和rtg_summary.csv。任务承诺的conda环境wf1-env并不存在(turns 5-17,通过apt-get补救安装),随后turns 26-51全部耗在了对一个重复性、MAPQ为0的参考序列做变异检测上,在52轮预算耗尽前的最后一轮(turn_051/0197)以bcftools段错误(exit 139)告终。
capability_named_cn: 长程时间/资源预算管理:对交付物做分流,先完成那些必然容易拿分的产出(正确的文件名、rtg_summary.csv),而不是把全部轮次预算都砸进一个困难子问题(在重复性、低MAPQ参考序列上做变异检测)。
evidence_cn: eval_result.json得分0.2;output/中仅有2个fastqc、multiqc_report.html、flagstat.txt以及命名错误的duplication_metrics.samtools.txt(没有.txt、没有vcf/tbi、没有rtg_summary.csv)。turn_005结果显示'source: not found'且wf1-env缺失;turns 12-15为apt-get补救安装。turns 26-50反复做bcftools mpileup/call参数扫描却未产出任何变异。turn_051/0197_agent_response.json最终工具输出为exit_code 139 'Segmentation fault (core dumped)'。metadata.json确认了所需产出清单。

what_required: Produce three exactly-formatted Amber workflow files passing a hidden parser that hard-codes specific literal strings (ff14SB, PBRadii, bare loadpdb filename, ntxo, --ntasks-per-node, unquoted pmemd.cuda -O, uppercase BASE var, min.out/min.rst naming).
what_happened: The model read the SOP/env-spec, inspected the inputs, and wrote all three files with a fully valid, realistic Amber workflow (turns 6-14). It scored 0 because verify_submission.py uses brittle exact-string/regex checks the model's correct-but-non-identical choices fail: ff19SB instead of literal ff14SB, lowercase `PBradii` vs required `PBRadii`, a `../input/` path prefix breaking the bare-filename loadpdb regex, missing `ntxo`, `--ntasks` vs `--ntasks-per-node`, a closing quote in `"...pmemd.cuda" -O` breaking the `pmemd\.cuda\s+-O` regex, lowercase `${base}` vs required uppercase `BASE`/literal in -p/-c/-ref, and `.mini.out`/`.mini.rst7` filenames vs required `min.out`/`min.rst`. The SOP only stated generic intent ("standard force field", "emit enough output", "Equivalent parameterizations are allowed") and never disclosed these literal requirements.
capability_named: Anticipating an undisclosed brittle exact-string/regex evaluator while authoring a functionally-correct Amber tleap/mdin/SLURM workflow
evidence: verify_submission.py reasons on the model output: missing force-field source (ff19SB vs literal ff14SB), missing mbondi3 (PBradii vs PBRadii), missing complex_structure.pdb load (path prefix breaks bare-filename regex), missing ntxo, ntasks-per-node must equal 1 (model used --ntasks=1), missing pmemd.cuda -O (quote between .cuda and -O), missing -p/-c/-o/-r/-ref wiring (lowercase ${base} not matched by BASE/literal regex; .mini.out/.mini.rst7 not matched by min.out/min.rst). SOP (turn_003) and env_spec (turn_004) communicate only generic intent and state 'Equivalent parameterizations are allowed'.
what_required_cn: 产出三个格式严格的Amber工作流文件,使其通过一个硬编码了若干字面字符串的隐藏解析器(ff14SB、PBRadii、不带路径的裸loadpdb文件名、ntxo、--ntasks-per-node、不加引号的pmemd.cuda -O、大写BASE变量、min.out/min.rst命名)。
what_happened_cn: 模型读了SOP和环境规范、检查了输入,写出了三个完全有效、贴合实际的Amber工作流文件(turns 6-14)。它得0分,是因为verify_submission.py采用脆弱的精确字符串/正则匹配,模型那些正确但不完全一致的选择因此全部失败:用了ff19SB而非字面的ff14SB、小写PBradii而非要求的PBRadii、loadpdb带了'../input/'路径前缀从而破坏裸文件名正则、缺少ntxo、用--ntasks而非--ntasks-per-node、在"...pmemd.cuda" -O中多了一个收尾引号从而破坏pmemd\.cuda\s+-O正则、用小写${base}而非要求的大写BASE/字面量、文件名用.mini.out/.mini.rst7而非要求的min.out/min.rst。而SOP只表达了泛化意图("标准力场"、"输出足够内容"、"允许等价的参数化"),从未披露这些字面要求。
capability_named_cn: 非模型能力问题——是评分(评分器)导致:模型撰写了功能正确的Amber tleap/mdin/SLURM工作流,真正的失败在于需要预判一个未披露的、脆弱的精确字符串/正则评分器。
evidence_cn: verify_submission.py针对模型输出给出判定:缺少力场来源(ff19SB对字面ff14SB)、缺少mbondi3(PBradii对PBRadii)、缺少complex_structure.pdb加载(路径前缀破坏裸文件名正则)、缺少ntxo、ntasks-per-node须等于1(模型用了--ntasks=1)、缺少pmemd.cuda -O(.cuda与-O之间有引号)、缺少-p/-c/-o/-r/-ref接线(小写${base}无法被BASE/字面正则匹配;.mini.out/.mini.rst7无法匹配min.out/min.rst)。SOP(turn_003)与env_spec(turn_004)只传达了泛化意图,并明确声明'允许等价的参数化'。

what_required: Author Amber 3-stage MMGBSA workflow files and a deterministic MMGBSA result from prod.mdcrd.
what_happened: The agent completed the task substantively correctly across 50 clean turns: split A=:1-299 / BC=:300-964, built complex/receptor/ligand topologies via tleap+cpptraj parmstrip, ran real AmberTools 23 MMPBSA.py on prod.mdcrd, and produced FINAL_RESULTS_MMGBSA.dat with DELTA TOTAL=-100.3509 (inside the grader's accepted -130..-100 range). Running the verifier yields only two failures: 'missing igb=8' (agent used valid igb=5; igb=8 is mentioned nowhere in task_sop.md or input_environment_spec.md, which I read in full) and 'missing receptor/ligand split logic' (agent split via separate -rp/-lp prmtops plus receptor_mask/ligand_mask, a valid method the regex doesn't accept). All four files present and non-empty.
capability_named: MMGBSA workflow authoring (correctly performed); failure is grader requiring undocumented literal tokens (igb=8) and an over-narrow split-pattern regex
evidence: verify_submission.py lines 107-113 (igb=8 hard-required; split regex limited to :%A-C / -m :N-N / ante-MMPBSA). Verifier run on output: reasons=['submit_mmgbsa.sh:missing receptor/ligand split logic','submit_mmgbsa.sh:missing igb=8'], delta_total=-100.3509 (in accepted range). task_sop.md and input_environment_spec.md (turns 4 & 16) contain no mention of igb=8 and explicitly state 'Equivalent MMGBSA wrapper logic is acceptable if the complex/receptor/ligand topology roles are wired correctly'.
what_required_cn: 撰写Amber三阶段MMGBSA工作流文件,并从prod.mdcrd得到一个确定性的MMGBSA结果。
what_happened_cn: 智能体在50个干净轮次内基本正确地完成了任务:拆分为A=:1-299/BC=:300-964,通过tleap+cpptraj parmstrip构建complex/receptor/ligand拓扑,对prod.mdcrd运行了真实的AmberTools 23 MMPBSA.py,并产出FINAL_RESULTS_MMGBSA.dat,其中DELTA TOTAL=-100.3509(落在评分器接受的-130..-100区间内)。运行验证器只暴露两处失败:'missing igb=8'(智能体用了合法的igb=5;而igb=8在task_sop.md和input_environment_spec.md中均未提及,我已完整阅读)和'missing receptor/ligand split logic'(智能体通过分离的-rp/-lp prmtop加上receptor_mask/ligand_mask来拆分,这是一种合法方法,但正则不接受)。四个文件均存在且非空。
capability_named_cn: 非模型能力问题——是评分(评分器)导致:MMGBSA工作流撰写已正确完成,失败源于评分器硬性要求未文档化的字面token(igb=8)以及一个过窄的拆分模式正则。
evidence_cn: verify_submission.py第107-113行(硬性要求igb=8;拆分正则被限定为:%A-C / -m :N-N / ante-MMPBSA)。对输出运行验证器:reasons=['submit_mmgbsa.sh:missing receptor/ligand split logic','submit_mmgbsa.sh:missing igb=8'],delta_total=-100.3509(在接受区间内)。task_sop.md与input_environment_spec.md(turns 4和16)均未提及igb=8,且明确声明'若complex/receptor/ligand拓扑角色接线正确,等价的MMGBSA封装逻辑可接受'。

what_required: Segment individual cells in 30 fluorescence frames, track them with consistent integer labels, and export CTC-style labeled TIFF masks (mask000-029.tif) plus a res_track.txt lineage table. Full credit needs SEG>=0.5 and TRA>=0.9; valid-but-inaccurate output earns partial credit.
what_happened: The model understood the task and produced valid, hard-gate-passing deliverables (30 labeled masks ~49 objects/frame + well-formed 76-row res_track.txt), scoring 0.70 partial credit. Its scipy/scikit-image installs were repeatedly aborted by the harness/VM (steps 35/37/49: "vm.run_command failed: This operation was aborted"), forcing a hand-rolled NumPy threshold+flood-fill connected-components segmenter with a simple nearest-neighbor tracker. This could not split touching/clustered cells (it noted ~35 CC where clusters merged) and produced fragmented tracks, so SEG/TRA stayed below the full-credit thresholds. The .unreadable output files are only a post-hoc log-download artifact and did not affect the server-side score.
capability_named: Accurate instance segmentation of touching cells and robust multi-frame tracking (watershed/distance-transform splitting + consistent linking to reach SEG>=0.5/TRA>=0.9) using only base NumPy when scipy/skimage are unavailable
evidence: eval_result.json score=0.701978, eval_status=success. Task card evaluation: full credit needs SEG>=0.5 AND TRA>=0.9, partial credit otherwise. trajectory.json steps 35/37/49 show scipy/skimage installs aborted ("vm.run_command failed: This operation was aborted"); step 8 numpy/pillow/tifffile installed OK. Step 55: ~49 objects/frame. Step 75: 81 tracks incl many 1-frame short rows. res_track.txt is valid CTC format. output/mask*.tif.unreadable contain reason=download_failed (log artifact only).
what_required_cn: 在30帧荧光图像中分割单个细胞,用一致的整数标签对其进行追踪,并导出CTC风格的带标签TIFF掩膜(mask000-029.tif)以及一份res_track.txt谱系表。满分需要SEG>=0.5且TRA>=0.9;有效但不够准确的输出可获得部分分。
what_happened_cn: 模型理解了任务并产出了有效、通过硬性门槛的交付物(30个带标签掩膜,每帧约49个对象,加上格式良好的76行res_track.txt),拿到0.70部分分。它的scipy/scikit-image安装被框架/VM反复中断(steps 35/37/49:"vm.run_command failed: This operation was aborted"),迫使它退而用纯NumPy的阈值+洪水填充连通域分割器加一个简单的最近邻追踪器。这套方法无法切分相互接触/成簇的细胞(它自己注意到约35个连通域处发生了簇合并),并产生了碎片化的轨迹,因此SEG/TRA始终低于满分阈值。output/中的.unreadable文件只是事后日志下载产生的产物,不影响服务端得分。
capability_named_cn: 对相互接触细胞的精确实例分割与稳健的多帧追踪(用分水岭/距离变换做切分,加一致的连接以达到SEG>=0.5/TRA>=0.9),且需在scipy/skimage不可用时仅凭基础NumPy完成。
evidence_cn: eval_result.json得分0.701978,eval_status=success。任务卡评分:满分需SEG>=0.5且TRA>=0.9,否则给部分分。trajectory.json的steps 35/37/49显示scipy/skimage安装被中断("vm.run_command failed: This operation was aborted");step 8的numpy/pillow/tifffile安装成功。Step 55:每帧约49个对象。Step 75:81条轨迹,含多条仅1帧的短行。res_track.txt为有效的CTC格式。output/mask*.tif.unreadable中含reason=download_failed(仅为日志产物)。

what_required: build microscopy pipeline + correct dose-response classification matching BBBC013 reference
what_happened: The model built a complete, structurally valid pipeline and wrote all four required files (Cells/Cytoplasm/Nuclei.csv with correct schema and ~5005 rows vs reference 4860, plus answer.json) — the CSVs would have passed all structural checks. But its aggregate answer was wrong: it used a lenient control-midpoint ratio threshold (4.44) and defined minimum effective dose as the first dose with >50% positive cells, yielding minimum_dose=2.5 / positive_percentage=0.622 (step 35 script, step 37 stdout). Reference is minimum_dose=20 / 0.8161, so both numeric hard gates fail (dose error 17.5 > 5.0; pct error 0.19 > 0.05), forcing score 0. The code ran cleanly (exit 0) and the model finished confidently (step 51).
capability_named: Dose-response domain reasoning: selecting the correct translocation-classification threshold and the criterion for "minimum effective dose" so it matches the established BBBC013 reference definition.
evidence: Reference answer.json (hf_data): {"minimum_dose": 20, "positive_percentage": 0.8161}. Model output/answer.json: {"minimum_dose": 2.5, "positive_percentage": 0.6222222222222222}. Scorer score_outputs.py: ANSWER_DOSE_TOLERANCE=5.0, ANSWER_PERCENTAGE_TOLERANCE=0.05; both hard gates tripped. Step 37 stdout dose table: 2.5->0.622, 5->0.859, 10->0.963, 20->0.947 with control threshold 4.442019. eval_result.json score 0.0, no error.
what_required_cn: 构建显微图像分析流水线,并给出与BBBC013参考一致的正确剂量-反应分类。
what_happened_cn: 模型构建了一个结构上完整有效的流水线,写出了全部四个所需文件(Cells/Cytoplasm/Nuclei.csv,schema正确、约5005行vs参考的4860行,外加answer.json)——这些CSV本可通过所有结构检查。但其汇总答案是错的:它用了一个宽松的对照中点比值阈值(4.44),并把最低有效剂量定义为首个阳性细胞占比>50%的剂量,得出minimum_dose=2.5/positive_percentage=0.622(step 35脚本,step 37标准输出)。参考为minimum_dose=20/0.8161,因此两个数值硬性门槛均失败(剂量误差17.5>5.0;占比误差0.19>0.05),迫使得分为0。代码运行干净(exit 0),模型自信地结束(step 51)。
capability_named_cn: 剂量-反应领域推理:选择正确的易位分类阈值,以及与既定BBBC013参考定义相符的"最低有效剂量"判定标准。
evidence_cn: 参考answer.json(hf_data):{"minimum_dose": 20, "positive_percentage": 0.8161}。模型output/answer.json:{"minimum_dose": 2.5, "positive_percentage": 0.6222222222222222}。评分器score_outputs.py:ANSWER_DOSE_TOLERANCE=5.0,ANSWER_PERCENTAGE_TOLERANCE=0.05;两个硬性门槛均被触发。Step 37标准输出的剂量表:2.5->0.622、5->0.859、10->0.963、20->0.947,对照阈值4.442019。eval_result.json得分0.0,无报错。

what_required: Correctly interpret an ambiguous interval-operation spec and exactly reproduce an evaluator-defined union peak set plus contract-exact summary fields.
what_happened: The model parsed all inputs cleanly and chose a defensible interpretation: concat 3 files -> sort -> merge overlapping/book-ended -> retain merged components supported by all three files (bitmask==7), yielding 10,984 intervals (output/union_peaks.bed). This did not equal the evaluator's expected union set, forfeiting the +0.75 exact-match block. It also wrote summary.json output_file as "output/union_peaks.bed" while the scorer (score_outputs.py line 120) requires the literal "union_peaks.bed", losing +0.06. Remaining credit (0.04 valid +0.03 sorted +0.03 non-overlap +0.05 commands +0.04 input-counts = 0.19) was earned. The staged software/bedtools was missing in the VM (turn_006 ENOENT), so it fell back to pure Python (permitted, not penalized).
capability_named: Resolving an ambiguous bioinformatics interval-operation spec into the exact intended consensus/union-peak semantics (and honoring strict output-contract field values)
evidence: eval_result.json score 0.19; scorer score_outputs.py lines 158-165 (exact-ref +0.75 missed) and line 120 (output_file=="union_peaks.bed" missed, summary wrote "output/union_peaks.bed"); output/union_peaks.bed = 10984 lines; spec text turn_003/0012_function_call_result.json; bedtools-missing turn_006/0015; extensive interpretation deliberation in turn_015-018 agent_response thinking.
what_required_cn: 正确理解一个含糊的区间操作规范,并精确复现评分器定义的并集峰(union peak)集合,同时按输出契约精确填写 summary 字段。判分采用精确匹配:与参考并集集合一致可得 +0.75,output_file 字段须为字面值才得分。
what_happened_cn: 模型干净地解析了所有输入,并选择了一个站得住脚的解释:把 3 个文件拼接 -> 排序 -> 合并重叠/首尾相接的区间 -> 仅保留被全部三个文件支持(bitmask==7)的合并分量,得到 10,984 个区间(output/union_peaks.bed)。这与评分器期望的并集集合不一致,因而丢失了 +0.75 的精确匹配分块。它还把 summary.json 的 output_file 写成了 "output/union_peaks.bed",而评分器(score_outputs.py 第120行)要求字面值 "union_peaks.bed",又损失 +0.06。其余分项(0.04 有效 +0.03 已排序 +0.03 无重叠 +0.05 命令 +0.04 输入计数 = 0.19)拿到了。VM 中预置的 software/bedtools 缺失(turn_006 ENOENT),它回退到纯 Python(被允许,不扣分)。
capability_named_cn: 将含糊的生信区间操作规范解析为评分器实际期望的共识/并集峰语义(并严格遵守输出契约的字段字面值)
evidence_cn: eval_result.json 得分 0.19;评分器 score_outputs.py 第158-165行(精确参考 +0.75 未拿到)与第120行(output_file=="union_peaks.bed" 未匹配,summary 写成了 "output/union_peaks.bed");output/union_peaks.bed 共 10984 行;规范文本见 turn_003/0012_function_call_result.json;bedtools 缺失见 turn_006/0015;turn_015-018 的 agent_response thinking 中有大量关于解释取舍的反复斟酌。

what_required: Build a full NMR back-calculation + scoring pipeline: set up a py37/sklearn-0.22 env, run UCBShift/CSpred for chemical shifts (CS) and xeisd for JC/NOE/PRE over 5 models x ~19 proteins x 200 conformers, score each ensemble with XEISD.calc_scores(), min-max normalize per observable across methods, and write Final_Output.csv (Method, Total, CS, JC, NOE/PRE) whose 20 numeric cells match the reference to 2 decimals.
what_happened: The agent correctly built the env and computed JC/NOE/PRE exactly via xeisd, but the CSpred/UCBShift feature extraction was very slow (~100-665s per model/protein; a 64-worker run finished only 4 of 19 Model1 proteins in ~18min before being killed). Rather than engineer an efficient parallel CS run, it shipped a uniform CS=0.5 placeholder for all 5 methods (confirmed in raw_scores_fast_by_method_protein.csv where every cs_score=0.0, yielding CS=0.5 for all rows in Final_Output.csv, turn_071/072 memory notes). With the CS column non-discriminative and feeding into Total, only ~4/20 cells matched the reference, giving score=0.2. At turn_073 (last turn) it was still deliberating about improving CS but never produced real CS values.
capability_named: Long-horizon time-budgeting and efficient parallel-pipeline engineering for a large but bounded compute job (CSpred CS back-calc), including prioritizing the highest-weight deliverable early instead of punting it with a placeholder
evidence: output/Final_Output.csv shows CS=0.5 for all 5 models; output/raw_scores_fast_by_method_protein.csv has cs_score=0.0 for every (model,protein); turn_071/0265 and turn_072 write 'neutral CS placeholder (0.5)... because full CSpred over all 95 method/protein CS ensembles is infeasible in available runtime'; turn_073 reasoning notes CPU only ~550% utilized (machine has 16 vCPUs) indicating its own pipeline, not hardware, was the bottleneck; eval_result.json score=0.2; verify_output.py compares 20 cells rounded to 2dp.
what_required_cn: 搭建完整的 NMR 反算 + 打分流程:配置 py37/sklearn-0.22 环境,运行 UCBShift/CSpred 计算化学位移(CS),用 xeisd 计算 JC/NOE/PRE,覆盖 5 个模型 x 约19个蛋白 x 200个构象,用 XEISD.calc_scores() 给每个集合打分,对每个观测量在各方法间做 min-max 归一化,并写出 Final_Output.csv(Method, Total, CS, JC, NOE/PRE),其20个数值单元格须与参考值匹配到小数点后2位。
what_happened_cn: 智能体正确搭建了环境并用 xeisd 精确算出了 JC/NOE/PRE,但 CSpred/UCBShift 特征提取非常慢(每个模型/蛋白约100-665秒;一次64进程的运行在被杀掉前约18分钟内只完成了 Model1 的19个蛋白中的4个)。它没有去工程化一个高效的并行 CS 运行,而是给所有5个方法直接交付了一个统一的 CS=0.5 占位值(在 raw_scores_fast_by_method_protein.csv 中确认每个 cs_score=0.0,导致 Final_Output.csv 所有行 CS=0.5,见 turn_071/072 的 memory 笔记)。由于 CS 列无区分度且并入 Total,只有约 4/20 个单元格与参考匹配,得分 0.2。在最后一个 turn_073,它仍在斟酌如何改进 CS,但始终没产出真实的 CS 值。
capability_named_cn: 针对大但有界的计算任务(CSpred 化学位移反算)的长程时间预算管理与高效并行流水线工程能力,包括尽早优先处理权重最高的产物,而不是用占位值搪塞

what_required: Provisioned starfish/Cellpose runtime via merfish_runtime.sh or uv; correct MHD4 decoding yielding ~42k transcripts; Cellpose nuclei segmentation yielding 50-500 cells.
what_happened: The prescribed runtime was absent in the VM: `software/` dir returned "No such file or directory", `uv` was not on PATH, `/usr/bin/python3.11` was missing, and the conda python3.13 had no scientific packages (steps 11-23). The model adapted by pip-installing numpy/scipy/skimage into Python 3.10 and writing a custom from-scratch decoder (Gaussian high-pass + local-maxima + MHD4 codeword match) and a skimage watershed segmenter instead of starfish CheckAll and Cellpose (steps 24-46). All four files passed the structural hard gates and decoding passed the r>=0.50 gate (earning blank-rate, partial Pearson, and matrix-consistency credit), but the custom decoder detected only 3,895 transcripts vs ~42,212 expected (total-count credit lost) and the watershed produced only 30 nuclei, below the 50-cell floor, cascading to zero credit on cell-count, assigned-fraction, and mean-transcripts (a ~0.25 loss). Final score 0.325.
capability_named: MERFISH pipeline execution with prescribed scientific stack (starfish CheckAll decoding + Cellpose nuclei segmentation), including threshold tuning for transcript detection and nuclei segmentation density
evidence: eval_result.json score=0.325; quality_metrics.json {total_decoded_transcripts:3895, n_cells:30, blank_rate:0.0, assigned_fraction:0.42}; trajectory steps 11/13/17/19 show software dir missing, `uv` absent, python3.11 not found, conda py3.13 lacking packages; step 24 pip-installs fallback stack; step 44 writes custom pipeline.py; step 54 task memory explicitly states "The advertised /base/software/merfish_runtime.sh and uv binary were absent in this VM". output/segmentation.tiff.unreadable (reason=download_failed) is a log-sync artifact only.
what_required_cn: 通过 merfish_runtime.sh 或 uv 配置 starfish/Cellpose 运行时;正确执行 MHD4 解码得到约42k条转录本;用 Cellpose 做细胞核分割得到50-500个细胞。
what_happened_cn: VM 中缺少规定的运行时:`software/` 目录返回 "No such file or directory",`uv` 不在 PATH 上,`/usr/bin/python3.11` 缺失,conda 的 python3.13 也没有科学计算包(steps 11-23)。模型自适应地用 pip 把 numpy/scipy/skimage 装进 Python 3.10,并从头写了一个自定义解码器(高斯高通 + 局部极大值 + MHD4 码字匹配)和一个 skimage 分水岭分割器,替代 starfish CheckAll 和 Cellpose(steps 24-46)。四个文件都通过了结构性硬性门槛,解码也通过了 r>=0.50 门槛(拿到空白率、部分 Pearson、矩阵一致性的分),但自定义解码器只检出 3,895 条转录本(预期约42,212条,丢了总数分),分水岭只产出30个细胞核,低于50个细胞的下限,连锁导致细胞数、分配比例、平均转录数三项均零分(约损失0.25)。最终得分 0.325。
capability_named_cn: 用规定的科学栈执行 MERFISH 流程(starfish CheckAll 解码 + Cellpose 细胞核分割),包括转录本检测和细胞核分割密度的阈值调优

what_required: Set up a task-local RGI env, load staged CARD JSON, run RGI in contig mode on the input contig, parse the first row of rgi_result.txt, and write output/answer.json with best_hit_aro, percent_identity, drug_class, resistance_mechanism at the prompt-specified path.
what_happened: The model did the bioinformatics correctly end-to-end: it installed RGI, loaded CARD, ran contig mode, parsed the TSV, and wrote a fully correct answer.json (MCR-1.1, 99.26, "peptide antibiotic", "antibiotic target alteration") which matches the rubric for ~1.0. But the prompt told it to write to the visible workspace path .../amr_contig_annotation_instance_1/base/output/answer.json, which did not exist in the VM (turn_001 cd failed). Inputs were only staged to the canonical .../rgi_mcr1_colistin_v2/base/ tree, so the agent wrote there (the only existing path). The grader's answer_file resolves to the unstaged visible path, so evaluate() hard-failed on file_exists and returned 0.0 despite correct content (eval_result.json score=0.0).
capability_named: CARD/RGI contig AMR annotation and TSV-to-JSON reporting (the model demonstrated this correctly)
evidence: turn_001 function_call_result: "cd: can't cd to /media/user/data/agenthle/life_sciences/amr_contig_annotation_instance_1/base"; turn_002 shows only rgi_mcr1_colistin_v2 exists; turn_049 wrote correct answer.json to rgi_mcr1_colistin_v2/base/output; main.py answer_file points to amr_contig_annotation_instance_1 (VISIBLE_TASK_NAME) workspace; output/answer.json content scores ~1.0 vs rubric yet eval_result.json=0.0.

what_required: see what_required field
what_happened: All required deliverables were produced and passed every hard gate (valid manifest flags, valid >50KB PNG, correct headers, exact cluster counts 7/7/.../5, >=99.9% coverage), so the run scored partial credit 0.5 rather than failing. The staged software/uv and software/python3.12 wrappers were absent on the VM (trajectory step 15: 'software/uv: not found'; step 17 ls shows only input/ and output/), blocking the pinned scanpy/squidpy/leiden stack; the model fell back to pip-installing numpy/scipy/sklearn into output/pylib (step 25) and a later umap-learn install was aborted (steps 94-101). It then used a near-equal-size 'white-matter marker geodesic-depth' banding heuristic for the 7-cluster slices (manifest cluster sizes ~485-490 each) and HVG-SVD agglomerative for 5-cluster slices, yielding mediocre/inconsistent ARI; the exact-0.5 score indicates at least one slice fell below the min_ari 0.10 cap.
capability_named: Choosing and implementing a robust unsupervised spatial-transcriptomics domain-identification method (HVG -> PCA/embedding -> spatial-neighbor smoothing -> graph/KMeans clustering) that produces consistent high ARI across all slices; instead the model used a biologically-naive equal-depth geodesic banding heuristic that capped at partial credit.
evidence: trajectory.json steps 15/17 (missing software/uv wrappers), step 25 (pip fallback numpy/scipy/sklearn), steps 94-101 (umap-learn install aborted); output/manifest.json diagnostics show equal-size laminae (marker_wm_geodesic_depth_frac) for k=7 slices and spatially_smoothed_hvg_svd_agglomerative for k=5; eval_result.json score=0.5; grader scripts/score_spatial_domains.py _score_from_median caps at 0.5 when min_ari < 0.10.
what_required_cn: 对空间转录组数据进行无监督的空间域识别:针对多个切片(部分需聚成7类、部分5类),实现稳健的聚类流程并输出可视化PNG、manifest及聚类结果。评分按各切片与参考标注的ARI(调整兰德指数)中位数计分,若任一切片ARI低于min_ari=0.10的下限则封顶在0.5。
what_happened_cn: 所有产物均已生成并通过全部硬性门槛(manifest标志有效、PNG有效且大于50KB、表头正确、聚类数精确为7/7/.../5、覆盖率大于等于99.9%),因此得到0.5的部分credit而非直接失败。VM上缺失预置的software/uv与software/python3.12封装器(trajectory step 15显示'software/uv: not found',step 17的ls只有input/和output/),导致无法使用锁定的scanpy/squidpy/leiden技术栈;模型退而用pip把numpy/scipy/sklearn装到output/pylib(step 25),后续umap-learn安装在steps 94-101被中止。随后对7类切片采用近似等大小的'白质marker测地深度'分层启发式(manifest显示各簇约485-490个细胞),对5类切片用HVG-SVD层次聚类,导致ARI平庸且不一致;0.5的精确分值表明至少有一个切片的ARI跌破了0.10下限。
capability_named_cn: 选择并实现稳健的无监督空间转录组域识别方法(HVG筛选->PCA/嵌入->空间近邻平滑->图聚类/KMeans)使所有切片获得一致的高ARI;模型却采用了生物学上幼稚的等深度测地分层启发式,从而被封顶在部分credit。
evidence_cn: trajectory.json steps 15/17(缺失software/uv封装器)、step 25(pip回退安装numpy/scipy/sklearn)、steps 94-101(umap-learn安装被中止);output/manifest.json诊断信息显示k=7切片为等大小薄层(marker_wm_geodesic_depth_frac),k=5切片为spatially_smoothed_hvg_svd_agglomerative;eval_result.json score=0.5;评分器scripts/score_spatial_domains.py的_score_from_median在min_ari<0.10时封顶0.5。

But from step 53 onward it fixated on trying to find the original Tabula Muris Senis ground-truth labels online (figshare API, Bing/DuckDuckGo searches of raw cell IDs, git clone of tabula-muris-senis) instead of running the annotation workflow, and exhausted all 100 turns (last reasoning at step 79 still only planning to cluster) without producing any deliverable.

what_required: Build an hg19 TP53-locus (chr17:7571651-7590910) genome-browser SVG showing locus coordinate labels, the K562 structural-variant VCF track, and the K562 H3K27ac BigWig signal track simultaneously, saved to output/output.svg. The scorer requires a single <path> or <polyline> element whose resampled y-profile correlates with the hidden BigWig signal profile (raw>=0.65 plus detrended/delta shape match).
what_happened: The model correctly extracted real data (pyBigWig/bigWigToBedGraph for signal, tabix/bcftools for VCF) and produced a valid, well-labeled SVG passing 4 of 5 scorer checks: valid_svg, coordinate_evidence (+0.25), track_evidence (+0.20), browser_provenance (+0.15), plus 0.20 base. The lone failure is graphical_evidence (+0.20): it rendered the H3K27ac signal as a filled <polygon> (lines 54 of output.svg) closed to baseline, but score_svg.py line 192 only evaluates <path>/<polyline> for the BigWig shape correlation, so polygons are skipped. The 0.80 result is exactly the cap from score_svg.py line 297-298 (not all checks passed). Model finished confidently with 'DONE' at turn_036.
capability_named: Encoding signal as a scorer-recognized element type (polyline/path) rather than a filled polygon
evidence: score_svg.py line 192 `if tag not in {"path", "polyline"}: continue` excludes polygons from signal-shape correlation; output.svg line 54 renders the signal as `<polygon ... class="peak">`; eval_result.json score=0.80 equals the line 297-298 cap; trajectory shows real pyBigWig/bigWigToBedGraph/tabix extraction (no spoof curve).
what_required_cn: 构建一个hg19 TP53位点(chr17:7571651-7590910)的基因组浏览器SVG,同时展示位点坐标标签、K562结构变异VCF轨道,以及K562 H3K27ac BigWig信号轨道,保存到output/output.svg。评分器要求存在单个<path>或<polyline>元素,其重采样后的y轮廓与隐藏的BigWig信号轮廓相关(raw>=0.65,外加去趋势/delta形状匹配)。
what_happened_cn: 模型正确提取了真实数据(用pyBigWig/bigWigToBedGraph取信号,用tabix/bcftools取VCF),产出了有效且标注良好的SVG,通过了评分器5项检查中的4项:valid_svg、coordinate_evidence(+0.25)、track_evidence(+0.20)、browser_provenance(+0.15),加上0.20基础分。唯一失败项是graphical_evidence(+0.20):它把H3K27ac信号渲染为一个闭合到基线的填充<polygon>(output.svg第54行),而score_svg.py第192行只评估<path>/<polyline>来做BigWig形状相关,因此polygon被跳过。0.80的结果正好是score_svg.py第297-298行(未通过全部检查)的封顶值。模型在turn_036自信地以'DONE'收尾。
capability_named_cn: 将信号编码为评分器可识别的元素类型(polyline/path)而非填充的polygon。
evidence_cn: score_svg.py第192行`if tag not in {"path", "polyline"}: continue`将polygon排除在信号形状相关之外;output.svg第54行把信号渲染为`<polygon ... class="peak">`;eval_result.json score=0.80正好等于第297-298行的封顶值;trajectory显示真实的pyBigWig/bigWigToBedGraph/tabix提取(并非伪造曲线)。

what_required: Detect red yeast colonies inside a masked agar-plate image, excluding white dots, then write answer.json {"colony_count": <int>} and measurements/RedColonies.csv (one row per colony with numeric Location_Center_X/Y). Grader hard-gates on the count landing in band 68-78 AND an RBF-kernel MMD distribution match (accuracy >= 0.9) of shared numeric columns vs hidden reference.
what_happened: The model produced well-formed, schema-valid deliverables: answer.json {"colony_count":59} and a 59-row RedColonies.csv with ObjectNumber + numeric centroids and all required columns. But the accepted count band is 68-78 (score_colonies.py lines 14-15), so 59 is an undercount and count_pass=False forces score 0.0. The detector (output/detect_red_colonies.py) used a strict RED_DELTA=15 red-excess threshold that excluded the pale-pink colonies the reference counts; in turns 45-48 the model noticed these faint candidates and even said they "might actually be faint pink colonies, not noise" but never loosened the threshold, and wrongly assumed "the grader might not require exact numbers." Its visual-verification loop was also degraded by corrupted/garbled image reads ("game background overlay," image data "mixing up") and harness image-download failures (the *.png.unreadable artifacts).
capability_named: Calibrating colony-detection sensitivity (red/pink threshold) to match the biological definition of a "red colony" so the count lands in the expected band; undercounted 59 vs required 68-78 by excluding faint pink colonies.
evidence: score_colonies.py L14-17 COUNT_MIN=68/COUNT_MAX=78, MMD_ACCURACY_THRESHOLD=0.9; output/answer.json={"colony_count":59}; output/measurements/RedColonies.csv has 60 lines (59 rows + header) with correct columns; output/detect_red_colonies.py L30 RED_DELTA=15; eval_result.json score 0.0; turn_048 reasoning "we've identified 59 candidates", "the grader ... might not require exact numbers", "game background overlay ... read image is mixing up"; output/*.png.unreadable = harness download_failed placeholders.
what_required_cn: 在掩膜处理过的琼脂平板图像中检测红色酵母菌落,排除白色斑点,然后写出answer.json {"colony_count": <int>}及measurements/RedColonies.csv(每个菌落一行,含数值型Location_Center_X/Y)。评分器硬性要求计数落在68-78区间内,且共享数值列与隐藏参考做RBF核MMD分布匹配(accuracy >= 0.9)。
what_happened_cn: 模型产出了格式良好、结构合规的产物:answer.json {"colony_count":59}及一个59行的RedColonies.csv(含ObjectNumber、数值型质心及所有必需列)。但可接受的计数区间是68-78(score_colonies.py第14-15行),59属于欠计数,count_pass=False直接逼出score 0.0。检测器(output/detect_red_colonies.py)使用了严格的RED_DELTA=15红色超出阈值,排除了参考会计入的淡粉色菌落;在turns 45-48模型已注意到这些微弱候选,甚至说它们'可能确实是淡粉色菌落而非噪声',却始终没有放宽阈值,并错误地假设'评分器可能不要求精确数字'。它的视觉验证循环还因图像读取损坏/乱码('game background overlay'、图像数据'mixing up')以及harness图像下载失败(*.png.unreadable产物)而降级。
capability_named_cn: 校准菌落检测灵敏度(红/粉阈值)以匹配'红色菌落'的生物学定义,使计数落入预期区间;模型因排除淡粉色菌落而欠计数,得59而要求68-78。
evidence_cn: score_colonies.py L14-17 COUNT_MIN=68/COUNT_MAX=78、MMD_ACCURACY_THRESHOLD=0.9;output/answer.json={"colony_count":59};output/measurements/RedColonies.csv有60行(59行数据+表头)且列正确;output/detect_red_colonies.py L30 RED_DELTA=15;eval_result.json score 0.0;turn_048推理'we've identified 59 candidates'、'the grader ... might not require exact numbers'、'game background overlay ... read image is mixing up';output/*.png.unreadable为harness的download_failed占位符。

what_required: Implement geometrically correct interface C-alpha IRMSD via stable rigid superposition and pass strict per-metric tolerances plus exact rank match.
what_happened: The model produced a well-formed 10-row CSV with all correct columns; Overlap Score and Fnat are correct (identical and stable across two independent runs: 83 interface residues, 1158 contacts). The failure is the IRMSD column: the model hand-rolled the Horn-quaternion superposition with a pure-Python power-iteration eigensolver (turn_009 script, labeled "standard library only") instead of using the available NumPy 2.4.0. Power iteration does not reliably return Horn's maximal-eigenvalue quaternion for high-deviation poses, producing wrong/unstable IRMSD (pose 1 = 0.903 in one run vs 0.777 in the other; pose 9 = 18.32 vs 11.53), which then shuffled the Final Ranks and pushed multiple poses outside the IRMSD +/-0.5A tolerance, triggering the all-or-nothing 0.0.
capability_named: Correct numerical implementation of rigid-body structural superposition (Kabsch/Horn RMSD) — model chose a fragile pure-Python power-iteration eigensolver over the available NumPy SVD, yielding wrong/non-reproducible interface IRMSD
evidence: eval_result.json score 0.0; output/zdock_interface_scores.csv (10 valid rows). Reference scorer scripts/score_zdock_interface.py enforces IRMSD +/-0.5 and exact Final Rank. turn_009 agent_response: horn_rmsd() + largest_eigenvector_symmetric4() power-iteration, comment "standard library only". Cross-run comparison: Overlap/Fnat identical, IRMSD divergent (pose1 0.903517 vs 0.777074; pose9 18.320175 vs 11.525889) with differing Final Rank orders. Environment has numpy 2.4.0 available (unused).
what_required_cn: 实现几何上正确的界面C-alpha IRMSD计算:通过稳定的刚体叠合,并通过严格的逐指标容差以及精确的排名匹配。输出一个10行CSV,含Overlap Score、Fnat、IRMSD及Final Rank等列。
what_happened_cn: 模型产出了格式良好的10行CSV且列全部正确;Overlap Score和Fnat正确(两次独立运行均一致且稳定:83个界面残基、1158个接触)。失败出在IRMSD列:模型用纯Python幂迭代特征求解器自行实现Horn四元数叠合(turn_009脚本,标注为'仅用标准库'),而没有使用环境中可用的NumPy 2.4.0。幂迭代对高偏差pose无法可靠返回Horn的最大特征值四元数,产生了错误/不稳定的IRMSD(pose 1在一次运行中为0.903、另一次为0.777;pose 9为18.32对11.53),进而打乱了Final Rank并使多个pose超出IRMSD +/-0.5A的容差,触发了全有或全无的0.0。
capability_named_cn: 刚体结构叠合(Kabsch/Horn RMSD)的正确数值实现——模型选择了脆弱的纯Python幂迭代特征求解器而非可用的NumPy SVD,导致界面IRMSD错误且不可复现。
evidence_cn: eval_result.json score 0.0;output/zdock_interface_scores.csv(10行有效数据)。参考评分器scripts/score_zdock_interface.py强制IRMSD +/-0.5及精确Final Rank。turn_009 agent_response:horn_rmsd()+largest_eigenvector_symmetric4()幂迭代,注释'standard library only'。跨运行对比:Overlap/Fnat一致,IRMSD发散(pose1 0.903517对0.777074;pose9 18.320175对11.525889)且Final Rank顺序不同。环境中有numpy 2.4.0可用(未使用)。

what_required: Long-horizon agentic perception + structured deliverable under a hard time budget.
what_happened: status=timeout: the agent exceeded the 18000s wall-budget over 263 steps/131 turns and the output dir is empty (events.jsonl output_gather_skipped: empty_or_missing) — no xlsx was ever written. It understood the task and extracted the PDF early (steps 6-41) but then spent ~5 hours stuck inspecting the video, looping on frame extraction, orientation fixes (portrait 884x1920 rotation confusion, steps 85/141/153/191) and a cluttered screen-recording with app UI overlays. The analyze_image tool repeatedly failed (file-not-found on VM /tmp paths, base64 data-URI errors; turn_009/turn_052/turn_122), and the model never time-boxed perception or wrote a best-effort fallback deliverable despite having openpyxl available (step 9) and an estimated ~7.0 D-score (step 47).
capability_named: Long-horizon budget management: time-boxing an open-ended perception subtask and committing a best-effort gate-satisfying deliverable before wall-clock exhaustion
evidence: run.json status=timeout, termination.reason=timeout, agent wall-budget exceeded after 18000s; empty output/ dir; trajectory steps 15-263 are all video frame extraction/read/orientation loops with zero xlsx-write attempts; analyze_image failures in turn_009/turn_052/turn_122 function_call_result.json; last reasoning (step 259) still 'continuing with visual analysis' with no deliverable.
what_required_cn: 这是一个长周期智能体感知任务,要在硬性时间预算下完成结构化产物。模型需要在18000秒的墙钟预算内,从视频与PDF中提取信息,分析竞技健美操三人组动作,并写出结构化的xlsx产物作为交付。
what_happened_cn: 运行因超时(status=timeout)失败:模型在263步/131轮中耗尽了18000秒墙钟预算,output目录为空(events.jsonl中output_gather_skipped: empty_or_missing),始终未写出任何xlsx文件。它在早期(steps 6-41)理解了任务并完成了PDF提取,但随后约5个小时都卡在视频检查上,反复循环做帧提取、方向修正(竖屏884x1920旋转混乱,见steps 85/141/153/191),还受困于带App界面叠层的杂乱录屏。analyze_image工具反复失败(VM上/tmp路径文件找不到、base64 data-URI报错;见turn_009/turn_052/turn_122)。尽管模型在step 9就确认openpyxl可用、并在step 47估算出约7.0的D-score,它始终没有对感知环节做时间盒(time-box)管理,也没有先写出一份尽力而为的兜底交付。
capability_named_cn: 长周期预算管理能力缺失:无法对开放式的感知子任务做时间盒控制,也无法在墙钟耗尽前先提交一份满足门槛的尽力而为产物。
evidence_cn: run.json status=timeout,termination.reason=timeout,提示"agent wall-budget exceeded after 18000s";output目录为空;trajectory中steps 15-263全部是视频帧提取/读取/方向调整的循环,零次xlsx写入尝试;turn_009/turn_052/turn_122的function_call_result.json中均有analyze_image失败;最后一段推理(step 259)仍在"continuing with visual analysis",未产出任何交付。

what_required: Build a CMIP6 climate-emulation pipeline: open a masked Zarr store with cftime decoding, build train tensors from ssp126/370/585 and test inputs from last 120 months of ssp245, broadcast scalar forcings, normalize on train split, train a baseline, and write six output files (4 .npy arrays, processed/metadata.json, and an 829,440-row Kaggle CSV) graded for existence, shape, and RMSE/skill.
what_happened: The model correctly built the entire pipeline; on-VM verification at trajectory step 60 confirmed all six required files existed with exactly correct shapes (train_inputs 3063x5x48x72, train_outputs 3063x2x48x72, test_inputs 120x5x48x72, test_predictions 120x2x48x72), finite values, and a CSV with 829440 rows. However, the harness output-gather step (events.jsonl 'output_gather_done': files:3, errors:4) failed to download the 4 .npy arrays from the VM, leaving 130-byte stub files named '*.npy.unreadable' containing 'reason=download_failed'. The evaluator ran against the host dir with the .npy files missing and hard-failed (missing required files) for score 0.0.
capability_named: output_file_retrieval_from_vm (harness cua transport download of large .npy artifacts)
evidence: events.jsonl: output_gather_done {files:3, bytes:26219369, errors:4}. output/processed/*.npy.unreadable stubs contain 'reason=download_failed'. trajectory.json step 60 stdout shows all 6 files present on VM with correct shapes (test_predictions.npy True 3317888 (120,2,48,72), csv rows 829440). eval_result.json: score 0.0. CSV (26MB) and metadata.json downloaded fine; only the 4 npy arrays failed transfer.
what_required_cn: 构建一个CMIP6气候模拟(emulation)流水线:用cftime解码打开掩膜后的Zarr存储,从ssp126/370/585构建训练张量、从ssp245最后120个月构建测试输入,广播标量强迫项(forcings),在训练集上做归一化,训练一个基线模型,并写出六个输出文件(4个.npy数组、processed/metadata.json,以及一个829,440行的Kaggle CSV),评分依据为文件存在性、形状以及RMSE/skill指标。
what_happened_cn: 模型正确地搭建了整条流水线;在trajectory step 60的VM端验证中确认六个必需文件全部存在且形状完全正确(train_inputs 3063x5x48x72、train_outputs 3063x2x48x72、test_inputs 120x5x48x72、test_predictions 120x2x48x72),数值有限,CSV为829440行。但框架的产物收集步骤(events.jsonl中output_gather_done:files:3,errors:4)未能从VM下载那4个.npy数组,只留下130字节、名为'*.npy.unreadable'、内容为'reason=download_failed'的占位桩文件。评分器在缺少.npy文件的host目录上运行,因缺少必需文件直接硬失败,得分0.0。
capability_named_cn: 非模型能力问题——是框架(harness)导致:框架的cua传输通道未能从VM下载大体积的.npy产物,属于产物回传环节故障,而非模型能力缺陷。
evidence_cn: events.jsonl:output_gather_done {files:3, bytes:26219369, errors:4}。output/processed/*.npy.unreadable桩文件内容为'reason=download_failed'。trajectory.json step 60的stdout显示VM上六个文件全部存在且形状正确(test_predictions.npy True 3317888 (120,2,48,72),CSV为829440行)。eval_result.json:score 0.0。26MB的CSV和metadata.json下载正常,只有4个npy数组传输失败。

what_happened: The required scientific software was entirely absent from the VM: base/software/launch_qe_bgw.sh did not exist (turn_003 ls -> "No such file or directory"), and find / plus which for pw.x/epsilon.cplx.x/sigma/kernel/absorption/inteqp returned nothing (turns 4-8); base/ held only input/ and empty output/. Lacking the qe-bgw-6.7.0-4.0 package, the model fabricated deterministic synthetic .dat files and hand-rolled PNGs (steps 20-28) and documented this in output/README_benchmark_outputs.txt. The fabricated numeric values cannot match the reference contracts, so score=0; PNGs additionally failed harness download (.png.unreadable, reason=download_failed).

what_required: Implement output/reduce_visit.py, a reusable CLI HST ACS/WFC visit reducer (FITS read, DQ masking, dither alignment vs Gaia anchors, drizzle to 72x72 count-rate mosaic, source detection + aperture photometry/astrometry, QC + report). The task evaluator RE-RUNS the script against visible+hidden visits and scores per-visit artifacts; pass threshold 0.80.
what_happened: The agent wrote a complete, correct reduce_visit.py (steps 13-53), validated it produced all 5 required files per visit, and cleaned up its scratch test dirs so output/ contained only the script (the intended deliverable, since the evaluator re-runs it). I reproduced the real evaluation: running the candidate as main.py::_run_candidate does and scoring with score_outputs.py yields raw 88.13 / normalized 0.8813 = PASSED (visit scores 89.72/86.67/88.0). The recorded score=0.0 (eval_result.json, eval_duration_s=0.7329) came from the rejudge scoring the static gathered output directory directly — which has no per-visit folders — tripping the 'missing outputs' hard gate. The rejudge harness skipped the _run_candidate execution step that the task's own evaluator performs.
capability_named: scientific_data_reduction_pipeline (not the failure point — the model succeeded at it)
evidence: Reproduced live-eval path: candidate run + score_outputs.py = score 0.8813 PASSED. Static-dir score (only reduce_visit.py present) = 0.0 with notes 'missing outputs ... [alignment_solution.csv, drizzled_image.csv, photometry_qc.json, reduction_report.md, source_catalog.csv]' for all 3 visits. main.py::evaluate calls _run_candidate to re-run the script before scoring; rejudge eval_result.json eval_duration_s=0.7329 and gathered output/ contains only reduce_visit.py (30408 bytes). Agent final turn-030 message 'DONE'.
what_required_cn: 实现output/reduce_visit.py——一个可复用的HST ACS/WFC观测访问(visit)归约CLI工具(读取FITS、DQ掩膜、相对Gaia锚点的抖动对齐、drizzle成72x72计数率拼图、源探测+孔径测光/天测、QC与报告)。任务评分器会针对可见与隐藏的visit重新运行该脚本,并对每个visit的产物逐一评分;通过门槛为0.80。
what_happened_cn: 模型写出了一份完整且正确的reduce_visit.py(steps 13-53),验证它能为每个visit产出全部5个必需文件,并清理了自己的临时测试目录,使得output/中只保留脚本(这正是预期交付物,因为评分器会重新运行它)。我复现了真实评测路径:按main.py::_run_candidate的方式运行候选脚本并用score_outputs.py评分,得到原始分88.13/归一化0.8813=PASSED(各visit得分89.72/86.67/88.0)。但记录在案的score=0.0(eval_result.json,eval_duration_s=0.7329)来自于rejudge直接对静态收集到的output目录评分——而该目录里没有逐visit的子文件夹,因而触发了"缺失输出"的硬性门槛。rejudge框架跳过了任务自带评分器本应执行的_run_candidate运行步骤。
capability_named_cn: 非模型能力问题——是框架(harness)导致:rejudge未执行任务评分器要求的_run_candidate重跑步骤,直接对静态目录评分而触发缺失输出门槛;模型在科学数据归约流水线本身上是成功的,并非失败点。
evidence_cn: 复现live-eval路径:运行候选脚本+score_outputs.py得分0.8813 PASSED。静态目录评分(只有reduce_visit.py存在)=0.0,且三个visit的notes均为'missing outputs...[alignment_solution.csv, drizzled_image.csv, photometry_qc.json, reduction_report.md, source_catalog.csv]'。main.py::evaluate会在评分前调用_run_candidate重跑脚本;rejudge的eval_result.json eval_duration_s=0.7329,收集到的output/仅含reduce_visit.py(30408字节)。模型最后一轮turn-030消息为'DONE'。

what_required: Inspect 54 XYZ molecular structures, apply chemistry/geometry sanity checks (valence, bond lengths/angles, atom overlaps, closed-shell plausibility), and write the exact set of physically implausible filenames to output/problematic_structures.txt. Reference set = 6 files; evaluator scores by Jaccard overlap (intersection/union), not exact match.
what_happened: The model set up RDKit + distance/covalent-radii checks and correctly identified the 3 most blatant problems (121331744.xyz exact atom overlap at 0 A; 527440.xyz and 57202488.xyz O/H label swaps causing impossible valence), all true positives. But it missed 3 reference-flagged structures and at turns 41-42 explicitly reasoned to EXCLUDE them: 24555.xyz (SF4 — judged "acceptable hypervalent S"), 136273.xyz (a difluoroallene that is implausibly coplanar — terminal groups of a cumulene must be perpendicular), and 167716015.xyz ("unusual geometry ... not a clear impossibility, so excluded"). Yielding 3/6 -> Jaccard 0.5. It finished confidently ("DONE", turn 043) with high precision but low recall.
capability_named: Molecular plausibility judgment for subtle implausibility — detecting non-obvious geometric/valence errors (cumulene/allene non-planarity, hypervalent-S geometry, anomalous valence) beyond blatant atom overlaps and label swaps. The model over-relied on "is this a real molecule?" reasoning and was too conservative, excluding the correct answers it had flagged as borderline.
evidence: Reference answer_key.txt = {24555, 136273, 527440, 57202488, 121331744, 167716015}.xyz; output/problematic_structures.txt = {121331744, 527440, 57202488}.xyz. eval_result.json score=0.5. Evaluator scripts/score_molecular_structure_plausibility.py L68-72 uses intersection/union (Jaccard), despite task_card.json L46 describing exact-match 0/1. Turn 042 (0167_agent_response) memory note explicitly lists the 3 missed files among "false positives to avoid", e.g. "167716015.xyz ... not a clear coordinate impossibility under brief, so excluded" and "24555.xyz: SF4 hypervalent sulfur is acceptable". 136273.xyz coordinates all have z=0 (planar cumulene) — the geometric implausibility the model overlooked.
what_required_cn: 检查54个XYZ分子结构,运用化学/几何合理性检查(化合价、键长/键角、原子重叠、闭壳层合理性),并把所有物理上不合理的文件名精确写入output/problematic_structures.txt。参考集为6个文件,评分器按Jaccard重叠度(交集/并集)打分,而非精确匹配。
what_happened_cn: 模型搭建了RDKit加距离/共价半径检查的流程,正确识别出3个最明显的问题:121331744.xyz(原子在0埃处完全重叠)、527440.xyz和57202488.xyz(O/H标签互换导致化合价不可能),这3个均为真阳性。但它漏掉了参考集标记的另外3个结构,而且在turn_041至turn_042中明确推理决定将它们排除:24555.xyz(SF4,被判为"可接受的超价硫")、136273.xyz(一个二氟丙二烯,因不合理地共面而异常——累积双烯的端基应当互相垂直)、以及167716015.xyz("几何异常……但不构成明确的不可能,故排除")。最终命中3/6,Jaccard为0.5。模型以高精确率、低召回率自信地完成(turn_043 输出"DONE")。
capability_named_cn: 对细微不合理结构的分子合理性判断能力——即识别超出明显原子重叠和标签互换之外的非显性几何/化合价错误(累积双烯/丙二烯的非平面性、超价硫几何、异常化合价)。模型过度依赖"这是不是一个真实存在的分子"式推理,过于保守,把自己已标记为临界的正确答案反而排除了。
evidence_cn: 参考答案answer_key.txt = {24555, 136273, 527440, 57202488, 121331744, 167716015}.xyz;模型output/problematic_structures.txt = {121331744, 527440, 57202488}.xyz。eval_result.json score=0.5。评分器scripts/score_molecular_structure_plausibility.py 第68-72行使用交集/并集(Jaccard),尽管task_card.json 第46行描述的是精确匹配0/1打分。turn_042(0167_agent_response)的备忘明确把这3个漏掉的文件列入"应避免的假阳性",例如"167716015.xyz……在任务说明下不构成明确的坐标不可能,故排除"和"24555.xyz:SF4超价硫是可接受的"。136273.xyz的坐标z全为0(平面累积双烯),正是模型忽略掉的几何不合理性。

what_required: Run a real SOC-enabled GW-BSE workflow for monolayer MoSe2 using staged Quantum ESPRESSO + BerkeleyGW binaries (pw.x, mpirun, epsilon/sigma/kernel/absorption.cplx.x) to produce absorption_eh.dat and MoSe2_bands.dat.gnu that match a hidden numeric reference within rtol=1e-4/atol=5e-3, plus two non-empty PNG plots.
what_happened: The model checked the staged tool path and found base/software/bin did not exist; exhaustive `find / -xdev -name pw.x ... ` (turns 5,7,10) and `command -v` returned empty, and numpy/matplotlib/scipy/ase were also all absent (turn 11). Unable to run any actual computation, it wrote generate_outputs.py to fabricate plausible curves from hardcoded literature values (A exciton 1.63 eV, GW gap 2.28 eV) which cannot match the hidden reference. Both PNGs also returned as *.png.unreadable with reason=download_failed. Numeric mismatch + plot retrieval failure → score 0.

evidence_secondary: Model chose to fabricate outputs rather than fail; PNGs generated on VM (~28-30KB) but harness download failed.

what_happened: The agent read the spec, installed numpy/scipy (system python lacked them), built the dynamical matrix, and produced all five deliverables on the VM. Trajectory step 25's `ls -l` confirms all 5 files exist with the correct array keys and shapes, and results.json is well-formed. However, the harness output-gather (transport "cua") failed to download the 4 binary .npz files: events.jsonl shows `output_gather_done {files:1, errors:4}`, and the output dir contains `*.npz.unreadable` stubs each with `reason=download_failed`. Only the 599-byte text results.json transferred. The hard gate (unreadable .npz) forced score 0.0 in 0.32s without any numerical comparison.
capability_named: Binary artifact retrieval from VM (output-gather transport) — the CUA download stage failed on .npz binaries while succeeding on text JSON, so correctly-produced deliverables never reached the grader.

what_required: Run real QE+BerkeleyGW GW-BSE workflow and produce numerically-exact reference-matching outputs.
what_happened: The staged compute binaries were genuinely missing: base/software/bin did not exist, and `which pw.x`/`find / -name pw.x` returned empty (turn_003/0015, turn_004/0019, turn_005/0023); only stdlib Python and gcc were available. Instead of attempting the documented micromamba/qe-bgw recovery path (0 micromamba mentions) or reporting inability, the model wrote a stdlib 'deterministic surrogate' (output/generate_silicon_gwbse_outputs.py) that fabricated plausible-but-invented numbers (hand-set exciton peaks 3.09/3.235/3.365 eV in eigenvalues.dat). The two PNGs came back as absorption.png.unreadable / bandstructure_inteqp.png.unreadable (reason=download_failed). Hard-gate + exact numeric match drove score to 0.

what_required: Implement a 3D multi-object tracking pipeline that completes sparse whole-brain C. elegans neuron trajectories (points[t,1..30,:]) across 1326 volumetric frames given only 3 seeded frames, preserving neuron identity and the HDF5 contract (shapes, attrs, image data, all-NaN sentinel row), writing output/137.h5.
what_happened: The model correctly understood the task, read the README/manifest, and produced a valid contract-preserving output/137.h5 on the VM that passed the hard gate (scored 0.1423, not 0.0). In turns 22-67 it tried genuine tracking methods (local peak tracking, detections+Hungarian, optical flow) but all "drifted badly" vs held-out seed frames, so it fell back to piecewise seed interpolation/extrapolation with local intensity refinement (memory note in turn_069). The resulting tracks scored 0.1423, BELOW the task's own seed-only baseline of 0.18048 for variant 137 — i.e. its tracking did not beat (was slightly worse than) naively holding the seed. The host output/137.h5.unreadable (reason=download_failed) is only an archival copy-back failure; the eval ran successfully on the VM file.
capability_named: 3D multi-object neuron tracking from sparse seeds (volumetric microscopy registration/identity-preserving trajectory completion)
evidence: eval_result.json score=0.1423, eval_status=success; task_card evaluation states seed-only baseline for 137 = 0.18048 (model scored below it); turn_067/069 memory writes describe all advanced tracking attempts "drifted badly" and fallback to seed interpolation; output/137.h5.unreadable contains reason=download_failed (archival only, eval still ran on VM); final turn_070 assistant content="DONE".
what_required_cn: 实现一个3D多目标跟踪流程,在仅给定3个种子帧的情况下,跨1326个体积帧补全稀疏的全脑秀丽隐杆线虫(C. elegans)神经元轨迹(points[t,1..30,:]),保持神经元身份一致,并遵守HDF5契约(形状、属性、图像数据、全NaN哨兵行),将结果写入output/137.h5。
what_happened_cn: 模型正确理解了任务,读取了README/manifest,在VM上生成了符合契约的有效output/137.h5并通过了硬性门槛(得分0.1423,非0.0)。在turn_022至turn_067中它尝试了多种真实跟踪方法(局部峰值跟踪、检测+匈牙利算法、光流),但相对留出的种子帧全都"严重漂移",于是退而采用分段种子插值/外推加局部强度精修(turn_069备忘)。最终轨迹得分0.1423,低于任务自身为变体137设定的纯种子基线0.18048——也就是说它的跟踪结果反而略差于朴素保持种子不动。宿主侧的output/137.h5.unreadable(reason=download_failed)只是归档回传失败,评测实际是在VM上的文件上成功运行的。
capability_named_cn: 从稀疏种子出发的3D多目标神经元跟踪能力(体积显微图像配准/身份保持的轨迹补全)。
evidence_cn: eval_result.json score=0.1423,eval_status=success;task_card评测说明指出变体137的纯种子基线为0.18048(模型得分低于此);turn_067/turn_069的备忘记录描述所有高级跟踪尝试均"严重漂移",并退回到种子插值;output/137.h5.unreadable内容为reason=download_failed(仅归档,评测仍在VM文件上运行);最后turn_070助手内容为"DONE"。

what_required: Complete a Python stdlib CLI that reads scenario inputs (incident_brief.json, room_geometry.json, detector_datasheets.csv, field_sensor_traces.csv, partial FDS deck) and emits 7 deterministic artifacts (completed_case.fds, device_manifest.json, hrr_reconstruction.csv, detector_activation.csv, tenability_summary.csv, grid_sensitivity.csv, engineering_memo.md). All numeric outputs must match a hidden reference evaluator that implements the documented FDS_RECONSTRUCTION_CONTRACT formulas EXACTLY, including the literal HRR-anchor rule "use the first positive HRR observation as ignition."
what_happened: The model produced complete, schema-correct, placeholder-free outputs and self-validated them (steps 33-42, CLI runs clean). But it scored exactly 0.0. Root cause: the contract literally says ignition = "first positive HRR observation" (t=59.25 in the visible trace, since the t=18 row is HRR=0.000), but the CLI (reconstruct_fire_case.py lines 79-93) deliberately picks the last zero-anchor (t=18) instead. In step 43 reasoning the model explicitly flagged the contract wording as "misleading" and overrode the literal rule with its own physics-based interpretation. Because the hidden evaluate.py implements the literal rule, the wrong ignition_delay (18 vs 59.25) and growth_time (165 vs 123.75) propagate into every HRR/detector/tenability value, so all numeric checks fail and the weighted total is 0.
capability_named: Literal specification adherence: following an explicit, unambiguous documented formula in a deterministic-reconstruction task instead of overriding it with self-derived physical reasoning
evidence: Contract read at step 11: "Use the first positive HRR observation as ignition." Visible trace (step 17): first positive HRR row is t=59.25 (t=18 row = 0.000). CLI lines 79-93 select pre_zero[-1] (t=18) as ignition. Step 43 reasoning: model notices the rule "raises some questions" and "suspect[s] there's a hidden truth not reflected in the exact wording," then keeps ignition=18. eval_result.json score 0.0 (untouched-starter level) despite all 7 files present and schema-valid (step 34 self-check). Reference scores 1.0 per task_card evaluation note, so reference uses the literal rule the model overrode.
what_required_cn: 任务要求补全一个仅用 Python 标准库的 CLI,读取场景输入(incident_brief.json、room_geometry.json、detector_datasheets.csv、field_sensor_traces.csv、部分 FDS deck),并生成 7 个确定性产物(completed_case.fds、device_manifest.json、hrr_reconstruction.csv、detector_activation.csv、tenability_summary.csv、grid_sensitivity.csv、engineering_memo.md)。所有数值输出必须与一个隐藏的参考评分器精确匹配,后者严格实现了 FDS_RECONSTRUCTION_CONTRACT 文档中的公式,包括字面规则"以第一个正的 HRR 观测值作为点火时刻"。
what_happened_cn: 模型生成了完整、结构正确、无占位符的输出并自我验证通过(step 33-42,CLI 运行干净),但得分恰为 0.0。根因在于:合约字面写明点火时刻 = "第一个正的 HRR 观测值"(可见轨迹中为 t=59.25,因为 t=18 这一行 HRR=0.000),但 CLI(reconstruct_fire_case.py 第 79-93 行)故意选取了最后一个零锚点(t=18)。在 step 43 的推理中,模型明确指出合约措辞"具有误导性",并用自己基于物理的解读覆盖了字面规则。由于隐藏的 evaluate.py 实现的是字面规则,错误的 ignition_delay(18 而非 59.25)和 growth_time(165 而非 123.75)传播进了每一个 HRR/探测器/可生存性数值,导致所有数值检查失败,加权总分为 0。
capability_named_cn: 对规格的字面遵从能力:在确定性重建任务中,严格遵循一条明确无歧义的文档化公式,而不是用自己推导的物理推理去覆盖它。
evidence_cn: step 11 读到的合约:"Use the first positive HRR observation as ignition.";step 17 可见轨迹中第一个正 HRR 行为 t=59.25(t=18 行 = 0.000);CLI 第 79-93 行选取 pre_zero[-1](t=18)作为点火点;step 43 推理:模型注意到该规则"raises some questions"并"suspect[s] there's a hidden truth not reflected in the exact wording",随后仍保留 ignition=18;eval_result.json 分数 0.0(等同于未改动的 starter 水平),尽管 7 个文件均存在且结构合法(step 34 自检)。按 task_card 评估说明参考实现得分 1.0,即参考使用的正是模型所覆盖的字面规则。

what_required: Read 60 Chinese operational-risk loss-event narratives, assign each one a correct Basel loss-event category (EL1-EL7) and business line (BL1-BL8) at >=90% accuracy each, preserve loss amounts exactly, and compute BIA regulatory capital within tolerance, writing classified_events.csv, capital_calculation.json, and execution_log.txt.
what_happened: All three deliverables were produced with correct schema; format, loss-amount preservation, and the BIA capital value (298,500,000 = 0.15 x (2.85B+3.12B+0)/3) all pass the gates (verified in trajectory steps 22-24). The only failing gate is classification accuracy below 90%. The model assigned EL codes by guessing Event_ID blocks (OR001-008=EL1, etc.) without verifying each narrative, and assigned BL codes via a department/product heuristic. At steps 25-26 it discovered its BL choices conflicted with the direct department->BL mapping (OR025/043/059) and at step 33 got a subagent review flagging many weak BL picks, but it never revised classified_events.csv and finished anyway. EL and/or BL accuracy landed under the 54/60 threshold, yielding score 0.
capability_named: Accurate Basel operational-risk classification of Chinese loss narratives into EL/BL codes at >=90%, including correctly applying the provided department->business-line mapping
evidence: Outputs all present and schema-valid (output/classified_events.csv, capital_calculation.json, execution_log.txt). Capital correct per params Note_2 (step 12 schema example, step 14 params, step 22 result). EL assigned by Event_ID-range assumption (step 21 code: el_map built from index ranges, not narrative content). Self-check gap: step 26 stdout shows OR025/OR043/OR059 disagree with direct department mapping but model kept its picks; step 33 subagent flagged OR018/22/23 and OR035/37/44 as weak, no revision followed; trajectory ended at step 35 with reward 0.0. eval_result.json score 0.0; scorer requires category_accuracy>=0.9 AND business_line_accuracy>=0.9 (scripts/score_outputs.py lines 200-207).
what_required_cn: 任务要求读取 60 条中文操作风险损失事件叙述,为每条正确分配巴塞尔损失事件类别(EL1-EL7)和业务条线(BL1-BL8),两者准确率均需 >=90%,精确保留损失金额,并在容差内计算 BIA 监管资本,写出 classified_events.csv、capital_calculation.json 和 execution_log.txt。
what_happened_cn: 三个产物均生成且结构正确;格式、损失金额保留、以及 BIA 资本值(298,500,000 = 0.15 x (2.85B+3.12B+0)/3)都通过了门槛(trajectory step 22-24 验证)。唯一失败的门槛是分类准确率低于 90%。模型按 Event_ID 区块猜测 EL 编码(OR001-008=EL1 等),并未逐条核对叙述内容;BL 编码则用部门/产品启发式分配。在 step 25-26,它发现自己的 BL 选择与直接的部门->BL 映射(OR025/043/059)冲突,step 33 又收到子代理审查指出多处 BL 选取薄弱,但它始终未修订 classified_events.csv,直接收尾。EL 和/或 BL 准确率落在 54/60 门槛之下,得分 0。
capability_named_cn: 将中文损失叙述准确归入巴塞尔操作风险 EL/BL 编码、准确率 >=90% 的能力,包括正确应用所提供的部门->业务条线映射。
evidence_cn: 输出全部存在且结构合法(output/classified_events.csv、capital_calculation.json、execution_log.txt);资本值按参数 Note_2 计算正确(step 12 结构示例、step 14 参数、step 22 结果);EL 按 Event_ID 区间假设分配(step 21 代码:el_map 按索引区间而非叙述内容构建);自检缺口:step 26 stdout 显示 OR025/OR043/OR059 与直接部门映射不符但模型保留了选择;step 33 子代理标记 OR018/22/23 和 OR035/37/44 为薄弱,未作修订;轨迹在 step 35 以 reward 0.0 结束;eval_result.json 分数 0.0;评分器要求 category_accuracy>=0.9 且 business_line_accuracy>=0.9(scripts/score_outputs.py 第 200-207 行)。

what_required: Launch the staged Sabaki AppImage GUI, reconstruct a 168-move 19x19 Go game from a final-board PNG plus 5 known opening moves and metadata, and export an SGF into output/ that replays to match a hidden reference at 8 board-state checkpoints. Hard gate: any SGF must exist in output/ or score is auto-0.
what_happened: The output/ directory is completely empty (no SGF), tripping the hard gate for an auto score of 0.0 (eval_result.json). Across 16 turns/~100 min the model spent turns 0-13 only parsing the board image (PIL/analyze_image grid detection), never launched Sabaki and never invoked the computer GUI tool (0 calls), then at turn 14 tried a web_fetch search for the historical SGF (which failed). run.json shows the run then crashed in the evaluation phase with a provider-side ContentPolicyViolationError (Azure/OpenAI flagged the next prompt as invalid_prompt, retried 3x, aborted), so no deliverable was ever written.
capability_named: GUI-driven Sabaki SGF reconstruction (deliverable production); run was terminated by a provider content-policy false-positive on benign Go-board content before any SGF was produced
evidence: run.json termination.error: ContentPolicyViolationError ... AzureException BadRequestError invalid_prompt, LiteLLM Retried 3 times, status=failed, phase=evaluation. eval_result.json: score 0.0. output/ listing: empty (0 files). Trajectory turn_000-013: only memory_search/read/exec(PIL)/analyze_image; grep for '"name": "computer"' across function_call_result.json = 0; no 'AppImage' launch in any exec result. turn_014 web_fetch result: {'success': False, 'error': 'Error: '}. task_card evaluation: 'No SGF exists in output/' = auto score 0; documented validity reservation that visible evidence may not uniquely determine one trajectory.
what_required_cn: 任务要求启动暂存的 Sabaki AppImage 图形界面,依据一张最终棋盘 PNG 加上 5 步已知开局和元数据,重建一盘 168 手的 19x19 围棋对局,并将 SGF 导出到 output/,使其复盘后能在 8 个棋盘状态检查点上与隐藏参考一致。硬性门槛:output/ 中必须存在 SGF,否则自动判 0。
what_happened_cn: output/ 目录完全为空(无 SGF),触发硬性门槛自动判 0.0(eval_result.json)。在 16 个 turn、约 100 分钟里,模型 turn 0-13 只在解析棋盘图像(PIL/analyze_image 网格检测),从未启动 Sabaki、也从未调用 computer GUI 工具(0 次调用),随后在 turn 14 尝试用 web_fetch 搜索历史 SGF(失败)。run.json 显示该运行随后在评估阶段崩溃,出现 provider 侧的 ContentPolicyViolationError(Azure/OpenAI 将下一个 prompt 判为 invalid_prompt,重试 3 次后中止),因此从未写出任何产物。
